arXiv:2605.06218v3 Announce Type: replace 
Abstract: Piecewise affine neural networks (PANNs) provide a principled geometric perspective on neural network expressivity by characterizing the input--output map as a continuous piecewise affine (CPA) function whose complexity is governed by the number, arrangement, and shapes of its affine regions. However, existing interpretability and expressivity analyses often rely on indirect proxies (e.g., activation statistics or theoretical upper bounds) and

industry.title: When Does $\ell_2$-Boosting Overfit Benignly? High-Dimensional Risk Asymptotics and the $\ell_1$ Implicit Bias
industry.content:
arXiv:2605.06314v2 Announce Type: replace 
Abstract: Benign overfitting is well-characterized in $\ell_2$ geometries, but its behavior under the $\ell_1$ implicit bias of greedy ensembles remains challenging. The analytical barrier stems from the non-linear coupling of coordinate selection thresholds, which invalidates standard spectral resolvent tools. To isolate this algorithmic bias, we characterize the high-dimensional risk of continuous-time $\ell_2$-Boosting over $p$ features and $n$ sampl

industry.title: Hyperbolic Concept Bottleneck Models
industry.content:
arXiv:2605.06440v2 Announce Type: replace 
Abstract: Concept Bottleneck Models (CBMs) have become a popular approach to enable interpretability in neural networks by constraining classifier inputs to a set of human-understandable concepts. While effective, current models embed concepts in flat Euclidean space, treating them as independent, orthogonal dimensions. Concepts, however, are highly structured and organized in semantic hierarchies. To resolve this mismatch, we propose Hyperbolic Concept

industry.title: On Training in Imagination
industry.content:
arXiv:2605.06732v2 Announce Type: replace 
Abstract: State-of-the-art model-based reinforcement learning methods train policies on imagined rollouts. These rollouts are trajectories generated by a learned dynamics model and are scored by a learned reward model, but without querying the true environment during policy updates. We study this training paradigm by quantifying how errors in learned dynamics and reward models affect returns and policy optimization. First, we extend the analysis of Asad

industry.title: Distributional Process Reward Models: Calibrated Prediction of Future Rewards via Conditional Optimal Transport
industry.content:
arXiv:2605.06785v2 Announce Type: replace 
Abstract: Inference-time scaling methods rely on Process Reward Models (PRMs), which are often poorly calibrated and overestimate success probabilities. We propose, to our knowledge, the first use of conditional optimal transport for calibrating PRMs, modifying conditional OT (CondOT) map learning \cite{bunne2022supervised} to estimate a monotonic conditional quantile function over success probabilities estimated by the PRM, conditioned on PRM hidden st

industry.title: Continuous First, Discrete Later: VQ-VAEs Without Dimensional Collapse
industry.content:
arXiv:2605.06870v2 Announce Type: replace 
Abstract: While many approaches to improve VQ-VAE performance focus on codebook size and utilization, the effect of dimensional collapse, where trained VQ-VAE representations live in an extremely low-dimensional subspace (1-2% of full rank), remains unaddressed. We show theoretically and empirically that dimension collapse causes a hard loss lower bound that various codebook improvement techniques fail to surpass. Our analytic framework extends the sequ

industry.title: P-Flow: Proxy-gradient Flows for Linear Inverse Problems
industry.content:
arXiv:2605.08328v2 Announce Type: replace 
Abstract: Generative models based on flow matching have emerged as a powerful paradigm for inverse problems, offering straighter trajectories and faster sampling compared to diffusion models. However, existing approaches often necessitate differentiating through unrolled paths, leading to numerical instability and prohibitive computational overhead. To address this, we propose P-Flow, a framework that stabilizes the reconstruction process by leveraging

industry.title: Direct Bethe Free Energy Minimization for Bayesian Neural Network
industry.content:
arXiv:2605.08446v2 Announce Type: replace 
Abstract: We propose training Bayesian neural networks by directly minimizing the Bethe free energy rather than maximizing a variational lower bound. On tree-structured factor graphs the Bethe free energy is exact; deterministic layers drop out of the objective and are trained by standard backpropagation, so the framework accommodates any mixture of probabilistic and deterministic subgraphs without modification. Restricting the weight posterior to a las

industry.title: Worst-Case Regret Bounds for Combinatorial Thompson Sampling in Sleeping Semi-Bandits
industry.content:
arXiv:2605.09277v2 Announce Type: replace 
Abstract: We revisit combinatorial Thompson sampling (CTS) for semi-bandits with sleeping arms, where arm availability varies over time and actions must satisfy combinatorial constraints, as in wireless mesh routing with fluctuating link availability. Despite its practical relevance, CTS has been hindered by several long-standing problems: (i) the absence of worst-case regret guarantees in the semi-bandit setting even without sleeping arms, (ii) the lac

industry.title: HS-FNO: History-Space Fourier Neural Operator for Non-Markovian Partial Differential Equations
industry.content:
arXiv:2605.09523v2 Announce Type: replace 
Abstract: Neural operators provide fast surrogate models for time-dependent partial differential equations, but their standard autoregressive use usually assumes that the instantaneous field $u(t,\cdot)$ is a complete state. This assumption fails for delay equations, distributed-memory systems, and other non-Markovian dynamics: two trajectories may agree at time $t$ and nevertheless have different futures because their histories differ. We introduce the

industry.title: Refresh-Scaling the Memory of Balanced Adam
industry.content:
arXiv:2605.10119v2 Announce Type: replace 
Abstract: Recent evidence suggests that Adam performs robustly when its momentum parameters are tied, $\beta_1=\beta_2$, reducing the optimizer to a single remaining parameter. However, how this parameter should be set remains poorly understood. We argue that, in balanced Adam, $\beta$ should not be treated as a dimensionless constant: it defines a statistical memory horizon $H_\beta=(1-\beta)^{-1}$. In terms of the effective learning horizon $T_{\mathr

industry.title: BROS: Bias-Corrected Randomized Subspaces for Memory-Efficient Single-Loop Bilevel Optimization
industry.content:
arXiv:2605.10288v2 Announce Type: replace 
Abstract: Stochastic bilevel optimization (SBO) has become a standard framework for hyperparameter learning, data reweighting, representation learning, and data-mixture optimization in deep learning. Existing exact single-loop SBO methods and memory-efficient surrogate SBO methods either create severe memory pressure for large lower-level neural networks or lack competitive convergence guarantees under standard assumptions. In this paper, we propose BRO

industry.title: Follow the Mean: Reference-Guided Flow Matching
industry.content:
arXiv:2605.10302v2 Announce Type: replace 
Abstract: Existing approaches to controllable generation typically rely on fine-tuning, auxiliary networks, or test-time search. We show that flow matching admits a different control interface: adaptation through examples. For deterministic interpolants, the velocity field is solely governed by a conditional endpoint mean; shifting this mean shifts the flow itself. This yields a simple principle for controllable generation: steer a pretrained model by c

industry.title: DeepL\'evy: Learning Heavy-Tailed Uncertainty in Highly Volatile Time Series
industry.content:
arXiv:2605.10364v2 Announce Type: replace 
Abstract: Modeling uncertainty in heavy-tailed time series remains a critical challenge for deep probabilistic forecasting models, which often struggle to capture abrupt, extreme events. While L\'evy stable distributions offer a natural framework for modeling such non-Gaussian behaviors, the intractability of their probability density functions severely limits conventional likelihood-based inference. To address this, we introduce DeepL\'evy, a neural fr

industry.title: On periodic distributed representations using Fourier embeddings
industry.content:
arXiv:2605.10818v2 Announce Type: replace 
Abstract: Periodic signals are critical for representing physical and perceptual phenomena. Scalar, real angular measures, e.g., radians and degrees, result in difficulty processing and distinguishing nearby angles, especially when their absolute difference exceeds pi. We can avoid this problem by using real-valued, periodic embeddings in high-dimensional space. These representations also allow us to control the nature of their dot product similarities,

industry.title: DECO: Sparse Mixture-of-Experts with Dense-Comparable Performance on End-Side Devices
industry.content:
arXiv:2605.10933v2 Announce Type: replace 
Abstract: While Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) scales model capacity without proportionally increasing computation, its massive total parameter footprint creates significant storage and memory-access bottlenecks, which hinder efficient end-side deployment that simultaneously requires high performance, low computational cost, and small storage overhead. To achieve these properties, we present DECO, a sparse MoE architecture designed to match the performance of

industry.title: DiFaReli++: Diffusion Face Relighting with Consistent Cast Shadows
industry.content:
arXiv:2304.09479v5 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: We introduce a novel approach to single-view face relighting in the wild, addressing challenges such as global illumination and cast shadows. A common scheme in recent methods involves intrinsically decomposing an input image into 3D shape, albedo, and lighting, then recomposing it with the target lighting. However, estimating these components is error-prone and requires many training examples with ground-truth lighting to generalize wel

industry.title: Sparsity-Constraint Optimization via Splicing Iteration
industry.content:
arXiv:2406.12017v2 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: Sparsity-constrained optimization underlies many problems in signal processing, statistics, and machine learning. State-of-the-art hard-thresholding (HT) algorithms rely on an appropriately selected continuous step-size parameter to ensure convergence. In this paper, we propose a naturally convergent iterative algorithm, SCOPE (Sparsity-Constrained Optimization via sPlicing itEration). The algorithm is capable of optimizing nonlinear dif

industry.title: Reconsidering the energy efficiency of spiking neural networks
industry.content:
arXiv:2409.08290v4 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: Spiking Neural Networks (SNNs) promise higher energy efficiency over conventional Quantized Artificial Neural Networks (QNNs) due to their event-driven, spike-based computation. However, prevailing energy evaluations often oversimplify, focusing on computational aspects while neglecting critical overheads like comprehensive data movement and memory access. Such simplifications can lead to misleading conclusions regarding the true energy

industry.title: Dirichlet process mixtures of block $g$ priors for model selection and prediction in linear models
industry.content:
arXiv:2411.00471v3 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: This paper introduces Dirichlet process mixtures of block $g$ priors for model selection and prediction in linear models. These priors are extensions of traditional mixtures of $g$ priors that allow for differential shrinkage for various (data-selected) blocks of parameters while fully accounting for the predictors' correlation structure, providing a bridge between the literatures on model selection and continuous shrinkage priors. We sh

industry.title: Monitoring access to piped water and sanitation infrastructure in Africa at disaggregated scales using satellite imagery and self-supervised learning
industry.content:
arXiv:2411.19093v4 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: Access to drinking water and sanitation services is essential for health and well-being, yet large global disparities persist. Sustainable Development Goal (SDG) 6 sets targets for universal access to these services, but progress toward these targets is hindered by existing monitoring systems that rely heavily on costly, infrequent, spatially uneven household surveys and censuses subject to substantial reporting delays. To address this g

industry.title: Bayesian Surrogate Training on Multiple Data Sources: A Hybrid Modeling Strategy
industry.content:
arXiv:2412.11875v3 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: Surrogate models are often used as computationally efficient approximations to complex simulation models, enabling tasks such as solving inverse problems, sensitivity analysis, and probabilistic forward predictions, which would otherwise be computationally infeasible. During training, surrogate parameters are fitted such that the surrogate reproduces the simulation model's outputs as closely as possible. However, the simulation model its

industry.title: Shapley Value Approximation Based on k-Additive Games
industry.content:
arXiv:2502.04763v2 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: The Shapley value is the prevalent solution for fair division problems in which a payout is to be divided among multiple agents. By adopting a game-theoretic view, the idea of fair division and the Shapley value can also be used in machine learning to quantify the individual contribution of features or data points to the performance of a predictive model. Despite its popularity and axiomatic justification, the Shapley value suffers from

industry.title: Fully AI-Generated Image Detection: Definition, Recent Advances and Challenges
industry.content:
arXiv:2502.19716v2 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: Recent advances in visual generative models have enabled the creation of highly realistic, fully AI-generated images without relying on real source content. While beneficial for many applications, these models also pose significant societal risks, as they can be easily exploited to produce convincing Deepfakes. Detecting them represents a foundational yet challenging problem in AI media forensics, requiring detectors to reliably extract

industry.title: Smoothed Analysis of Learning from Positive Samples
industry.content:
arXiv:2504.10428v2 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: Binary classification from positive-only samples is a variant of PAC learning where the learner receives i.i.d. positive samples and aims to learn a classifier with low error. Previous work by Natarajan, Gereb-Graus, and Shvaytser characterized learnability and revealed a largely negative picture: almost no interesting classes, including two-dimensional halfspaces, are learnable. This poses a challenge for applications from bioinformatic

industry.title: Reconstructing Sepsis Trajectories from Clinical Case Reports using LLMs: the Textual Time Series Corpus for Sepsis
industry.content:
arXiv:2504.12326v3 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: Clinical case reports and discharge summaries may be the most complete and accurate summarization of patient encounters, yet they are finalized, i.e., timestamped after the encounter. Complementary structured data streams become available sooner but suffer from incompleteness. To train models and algorithms on more complete and temporally fine-grained data, we construct a pipeline to phenotype, extract, and annotate time-localized findin

industry.title: Sparse Attention Remapping with Clustering for Efficient LLM Decoding on PIM
industry.content:
arXiv:2505.05772v2 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: Transformer-based models are the foundation of modern machine learning, but their execution, particularly during autoregressive decoding in large language models (LLMs), places significant pressure on memory systems due to frequent memory accesses and growing key-value (KV) caches. This creates a bottleneck in memory bandwidth, especially as context lengths increase. Processing-in-memory (PIM) architectures are a promising solution, offe

industry.title: Ice Cream Doesn't Cause Drowning: Benchmarking LLMs Against Statistical Pitfalls in Causal Inference
industry.content:
arXiv:2505.13770v3 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: Reliable causal inference is essential for making decisions in high-stakes areas like medicine, economics, and public policy. However, it remains unclear whether large language models (LLMs) can handle rigorous and trustworthy statistical causal inference. Current benchmarks usually involve simplified tasks. For example, these tasks might only ask LLMs to identify semantic causal relationships or draw conclusions directly from raw data.

industry.title: Integral Imprecise Probability Metrics
industry.content:
arXiv:2505.16156v3 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: Quantifying differences between probability distributions is fundamental to statistics and machine learning, primarily for comparing statistical uncertainty. In contrast, epistemic uncertainty -- due to incomplete knowledge -- requires richer representations than those offered by classical probability. Imprecise probability (IP) theory offers such models, capturing ambiguity and partial belief. This has driven growing interest in impreci

industry.title: Offline Constrained Reinforcement Learning under Partial Data Coverage
industry.content:
arXiv:2505.17506v2 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: We study offline constrained reinforcement learning with general function approximation in discounted constrained Markov decision processes. Prior methods either require full data coverage for evaluating intermediate policies, lack oracle efficiency, or requires the knowledge of data-generating distribution for policy extraction. We propose PDOCRL, an oracle-efficient primal-dual algorithm based on a decomposed linear-programming formula

industry.title: Approximating Simple ReLU Networks based on Spectral Decomposition of Fisher Information
industry.content:
arXiv:2505.17907v2 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: Properties of Fisher information matrices of 2-layer neural ReLU networks with random hidden weights are studied. For these networks, it is known that the eigenvalue distribution highly concentrates on several eigenspaces approximately. In particular, the eigenvalues for the first three eigenspaces account for 97.7% of the trace of the Fisher information matrix, independently of the number of parameters. In this paper, we identify the fu

industry.title: Stationary MMD Points
industry.content:
arXiv:2505.20754v3 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: Approximation of a target probability distribution using a finite set of points is a problem of fundamental importance in numerical integration. Several authors have proposed to select points by minimising a maximum mean discrepancy (MMD), but the non-convexity of this objective typically precludes global minimisation. Instead, we consider the concept of \emph{stationary points of the MMD} which, in contrast to points globally minimising

industry.title: Sequential Off-Policy Learning with Logarithmic Smoothing
industry.content:
arXiv:2506.10664v2 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: Off-policy learning enables training policies from logged interaction data. Most prior work considers the batch setting, where a policy is learned from data generated by a single behavior policy. In real systems, however, policies are updated and redeployed repeatedly, each time training on all previously collected data while generating new interactions for future updates. This sequential off-policy learning setting is common in practice

industry.title: Overparametrized models with posterior drift
industry.content:
arXiv:2506.23619v2 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: This paper investigates the impact of posterior drift on out-of-sample forecasting accuracy in overparametrized machine learning models. We document the loss in performance when the loadings of the data generating process change between the training and testing samples. This matters crucially in settings in which regime changes are likely to occur, for instance, in financial markets. Applied to equity premium forecasting, our results und

industry.title: MAC: Masked Agent Collaboration Boosts Large Language Model Medical Decision-Making
industry.content:
arXiv:2507.21159v3 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) have proven effective in artificial intelligence, where the multi-agent system (MAS) holds considerable promise for healthcare development by achieving the collaboration of LLMs. However, the absence of a systematic pipeline for agent construction and the rigidity of static collaboration patterns render current MAS-based models vulnerable to collaboration failures, resulting in substantial performance degrada

industry.title: Reflect then Learn: Active Prompting for Information Extraction Guided by Introspective Confusion
industry.content:
arXiv:2508.10036v2 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) show remarkable potential for few-shot information extraction (IE), yet their performance is highly sensitive to the choice of in-context examples. Conventional selection strategies often fail to provide informative guidance, as they overlook a key source of model fallibility: confusion stemming not just from semantic content, but also from the generation of well-structured formats required by IE tasks. To ad

industry.title: Improving the Accuracy of Amortized Model Comparison with Self-Consistency
industry.content:
arXiv:2508.20614v3 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: Amortized Bayesian model comparison (BMC) enables fast probabilistic ranking of models via simulation-based training of neural surrogates. However, the accuracy of neural surrogates deteriorates when simulation models are misspecified; the very case where model comparison is most needed. We evaluate four different amortized BMC methods. We supplement traditional simulation-based training of these methods with a \emph{self-consistency} (S

industry.title: Semi-Supervised Bayesian GANs with Log-Signatures for Uncertainty-Aware Credit Card Fraud Detection
industry.content:
arXiv:2509.00931v3 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: We present a novel deep generative semi-supervised framework for credit card fraud detection, formulated as time series classification task. As financial transaction data streams grow in scale and complexity, traditional methods often require large labeled datasets, struggle with time series of irregular sampling frequencies and varying sequence lengths. To address these challenges, we extend conditional Generative Adversarial Networks (

industry.title: Neural ARFIMA model for forecasting BRIC exchange rates with long memory
industry.content:
arXiv:2509.06697v2 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: Accurate forecasting of exchange rates remains a persistent challenge, particularly for emerging economies such as Brazil, Russia, India, and China (BRIC). These series exhibit long memory and nonlinearity that conventional time series models struggle to capture. Exchange rate dynamics are further influenced by several key drivers, including global economic policy uncertainty, US equity market volatility, US monetary policy uncertainty,

industry.title: Multi-modal Bayesian Neural Network Surrogates with Conjugate Last-Layer Estimation
industry.content:
arXiv:2509.21711v2 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: As data collection and simulation capabilities advance, multi-modal learning, the task of learning from multiple modalities and sources of data, is becoming an increasingly important area of research. Surrogate models that learn from data of multiple auxiliary modalities to support the modeling of a highly expensive quantity of interest have the potential to aid outer loop applications such as optimization, inverse problems, or sensitivi

industry.title: A Formal Comparison Between Chain of Thought and Latent Thought
industry.content:
arXiv:2509.25239v3 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: Chain of thought (CoT) elicits reasoning in large language models by explicitly generating intermediate tokens. In contrast, latent thought reasoning operates directly in the continuous latent space, enabling computation beyond discrete linguistic representations. While both approaches exploit iterative computation, their comparative capabilities remain underexplored. In this work, we present a formal analysis showing that latent thought

industry.title: Zero-shot Human Pose Estimation using Diffusion-based Inverse solvers
industry.content:
arXiv:2510.02043v2 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: Pose estimation refers to tracking a human's full body posture, including their head, torso, arms, and legs. The problem is challenging in practical settings where the number of body sensors are limited. Past work has shown promising results using conditional diffusion models, where the pose prediction is conditioned on both  measurements from the sensors. Unfortunately, nearly all these approaches generalize poorly across users, primarl

industry.title: Patterns behind Chaos: Forecasting Data Movement for Efficient Large-Scale MoE LLM Inference
industry.content:
arXiv:2510.05497v5 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: Large-scale Mixture of Experts (MoE) Large Language Models (LLMs) have recently become the frontier open-weight models, achieving remarkable model capability similar to proprietary ones. But their random expert selection mechanism introduces significant data movement overhead that becomes the dominant bottleneck in multi-unit LLM serving systems.
  To understand the patterns underlying this data movement, we conduct comprehensive data-mo

industry.title: Differentially Private Synthetic Text Generation for Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG)
industry.content:
arXiv:2510.06719v2 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) enhances large language models (LLMs) by grounding them in external knowledge. However, its application in sensitive domains is limited by privacy risks. Existing private RAG methods typically rely on query-time differential privacy (DP), which requires repeated noise injection and leads to accumulated privacy loss. To address this issue, we propose DP-SynRAG, a framework that uses LLMs to generate di

industry.title: Learning density ratios in causal inference using Bregman-Riesz regression
industry.content:
arXiv:2510.16127v2 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: The ratio of two probability density functions is a fundamental quantity that appears in many areas of statistics and machine learning, including causal inference, reinforcement learning, covariate shift, outlier detection, independence testing, importance sampling, and diffusion modeling. Naively estimating the numerator and denominator densities separately using, e.g., kernel density estimators, can lead to unstable performance and suf

industry.title: Feedback Lunch: Learned Feedback Codes for Secure Communications
industry.content:
arXiv:2510.16620v4 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: We consider reversely-degraded secure-communication channels, for which the secrecy capacity is zero if there is no channel feedback. Specifically, we focus on a seeded modular code design for the block-fading Gaussian wiretap channel with channel-output feedback, combining universal hash functions for security and learned feedback-based codes for reliability. The trade-off between communication reliability and information leakage is stu

industry.title: Arbitrated Indirect Treatment Comparisons
industry.content:
arXiv:2510.18071v2 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: Matching-adjusted indirect comparison (MAIC) has been increasingly employed in health technology assessments (HTA). By reweighting subjects from a trial with individual participant data (IPD) to match the covariate summary statistics of another trial with only aggregate data (AgD), MAIC facilitates the estimation of a treatment effect defined with respect to the AgD trial population. This manuscript introduces a new class of methods, ter

industry.title: Calibrated Multimodal Representation Learning with Missing Modalities
industry.content:
arXiv:2511.12034v2 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: Multimodal representation learning harmonizes distinct modalities by aligning them into a unified latent space. Recent research generalizes traditional cross-modal alignment to produce enhanced multimodal synergy but requires all modalities to be present for a common instance, making it challenging to utilize prevalent datasets with missing modalities. We provide theoretical insights into this issue from an anchor shift perspective. Obse

industry.title: Probabilistic Computers for Neural Quantum States
industry.content:
arXiv:2512.24558v2 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: Neural quantum states efficiently represent many-body wavefunctions with neural networks, but the cost of Monte Carlo sampling limits their scaling to large system sizes. Here we address this challenge by combining sparse Boltzmann machine architectures with probabilistic computing hardware. We implement a probabilistic computer on field-programmable gate arrays (FPGAs) and use it as a fast sampler for energy-based neural quantum states.

industry.title: Sparse Offline Reinforcement Learning with Corruption Robustness
industry.content:
arXiv:2512.24768v3 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: We investigate robustness to strong data corruption in offline sparse reinforcement learning (RL). In our setting, an adversary may arbitrarily perturb a fraction of the collected trajectories from a high-dimensional but sparse Markov decision process, and our goal is to estimate a near optimal policy. The main challenge is that, in the high-dimensional regime where the number of samples $N$ is smaller than the feature dimension $d$, exp

industry.title: VideoGPA: Distilling Geometry Priors for 3D-Consistent Video Generation
industry.content:
arXiv:2601.23286v3 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: While recent video diffusion models (VDMs) produce visually impressive results, they fundamentally struggle to maintain 3D structural consistency, often resulting in object deformation or spatial drift. We hypothesize that these failures arise because standard denoising objectives lack explicit incentives for geometric coherence. To address this, we introduce VideoGPA (Video Geometric Preference Alignment), a data-efficient self-supervis

industry.title: Parabolic Position Encoding: Vision-Centric, Principled, Extrapolatable, General
industry.content:
arXiv:2602.01418v2 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: We propose Parabolic Position Encoding (PaPE), a parabola-based position encoding for vision modalities in attention-based architectures. Given a set of vision tokens-such as from videos, event camera streams, images, or point clouds-our objective is to encode their positions while accounting for the characteristics of vision modalities. Prior works have largely extended position encodings from 1D-sequences in language to nD-structures i

industry.title: RACC: Representation-Aware Coverage Criteria for LLM Safety Testing
industry.content:
arXiv:2602.02280v2 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) face severe safety risks from jailbreak attacks, yet current safety testing largely relies on static datasets and lacks systematic criteria to evaluate test suite quality and adequacy. While coverage criteria have proven effective for smaller neural networks, they are impractical for LLMs due to computational overhead and the entanglement of safety-critical signals with irrelevant neuron activations. To addre

industry.title: Provably Data-driven Multiple Hyper-parameter Tuning with Structured Loss Function
industry.content:
arXiv:2602.02406v2 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: Data-driven algorithm design automates hyperparameter tuning, but its statistical foundations remain limited because model performance can depend on hyperparameters in implicit and highly non-smooth ways. Existing guarantees focus on the simple case of a one-dimensional (scalar) hyperparameter. This leaves the practically important, multi-dimensional hyperparameter tuning setting unresolved. We address this open question by establishing

industry.title: Targeted Synthetic Control Method
industry.content:
arXiv:2602.04611v3 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: The synthetic control method (SCM) estimates causal effects in panel data with a single-treated unit by constructing a counterfactual outcome as a weighted combination of untreated control units that matches the pre-treatment trajectory. In this paper, we introduce the targeted synthetic control (TSC) method, a new two-stage estimator that directly estimates the counterfactual outcome. Specifically, our TSC method (1) yields a targeted d

industry.title: Learning Compact Boolean Networks
industry.content:
arXiv:2602.05830v2 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: Floating-point neural networks dominate modern machine learning but incur substantial inference costs, motivating emerging interest in Boolean networks for resource-constrained deployments. Since Boolean networks use only Boolean operations, they can achieve nanosecond-scale inference latency. However, learning Boolean networks that are both compact and accurate remains challenging because of their discrete, combinatorial structure. In t

industry.title: Stopping Computation for Converged Tokens in Masked Diffusion-LM Decoding
industry.content:
arXiv:2602.06412v3 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: Masked Diffusion Language Models generate sequences via iterative sampling that progressively unmasks tokens. However, they still recompute the attention and feed-forward blocks for every token position at every step -- even when many unmasked tokens are essentially fixed, resulting in substantial waste in compute. We propose SureLock: when the posterior at an unmasked position has stabilized across steps (our sure condition), we lock th

industry.title: Diffusion-State Policy Optimization for Masked Diffusion Language Models
industry.content:
arXiv:2602.06462v3 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: Masked diffusion language models generate text through iterative masked-token filling, but terminal-only rewards on final completions provide coarse credit assignment for the intermediate filling decisions that shape the generation process. We propose Diffusion-State Policy Optimization (DiSPO), a plug-in credit-assignment layer that directly optimizes intermediate filling decisions. At selected intermediate masked states, DiSPO branches

industry.title: Constructive conditional normalizing flows
industry.content:
arXiv:2602.08606v3 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: Motivated by applications in conditional sampling, given a probability measure $\mu$ and a diffeomorphism $\phi$, we consider the problem of simultaneously approximating $\phi$ and the pushforward $\phi_{\#}\mu$ by means of the flow of a continuity equation whose velocity field is a perceptron neural network with piecewise constant weights. We provide an explicit construction based on a polar-like decomposition of the Lagrange interpolan

industry.title: Efficient Remote KV Cache Reuse with GPU-native Video Codec
industry.content:
arXiv:2602.09725v3 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: Remote KV cache reuse fetches KV cache for identical contexts from remote storage, avoiding recomputation, accelerating LLM inference. While it excels in high-speed networks, its performance degrades significantly in bandwidth-limited scenarios. Recent studies address this by transmitting KV caches in compressed form, but the associated heavyweight decompression counteracts the KV reuse benefits. In this paper, we propose an efficient an

industry.title: Distributed Quantum Gaussian Processes for Multi-Agent Systems
industry.content:
arXiv:2602.15006v2 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: Gaussian Processes (GPs) are a powerful tool for probabilistic modeling, but their performance is often constrained in complex, large-scale real-world domains due to the limited expressivity of classical kernels. Quantum computing offers the potential to overcome this limitation by embedding data into exponentially large Hilbert spaces, capturing complex correlations that remain inaccessible to classical computing approaches. In this pap

industry.title: Molecular Design beyond Training Data with Novel Extended Objective Functionals of Generative AI Models Driven by Quantum Annealing Computer
industry.content:
arXiv:2602.15451v3 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: Deep generative modeling to stochastically design small molecules is an emerging technology for accelerating drug discovery and development. However, one major issue in molecular generative models is their lower frequency of drug-like compounds. To resolve this problem, we developed a novel framework for optimization of deep generative models integrated with a D-Wave quantum annealing computer, where our Neural Hash Function (NHF) presen

industry.title: GeneZip: Region-Aware Compression for Long Context DNA Modeling
industry.content:
arXiv:2602.17739v3 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: Long-context DNA models are limited by token-mixing cost and by how compression allocates representational budget across the genome. Existing approaches operate close to base-pair resolution, apply fixed downsampling, or learn content-dependent chunks without an explicit genomic budget, making long-context pretraining expensive and difficult to control. We introduce GeneZip, a region-aware DNA compression framework that combines H-Net-st

industry.title: EsoLang-Bench: Evaluating Genuine Reasoning in Large Language Models via Esoteric Programming Languages
industry.content:
arXiv:2603.09678v2 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: Large language models achieve near-ceiling performance on code generation benchmarks, yet most of the programming languages used by popular benchmarks such as SWE-bench and HumanEval (e.g. Python, JavaScript) are squarely in-distribution. They appear at scale in pre-training corpora and are heavily reinforced during post-training. To study LLM performance on unfamiliar programming languages, we introduce EsoLang-Bench, a benchmark using

industry.title: Maximin Robust Bayesian Experimental Design
industry.content:
arXiv:2603.14094v2 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: We address the brittleness of Bayesian experimental design under model misspecification by formulating the problem as a max--min game between the experimenter and an adversarial nature subject to information-theoretic constraints. We demonstrate that this approach yields a robust objective governed by Sibson's $\alpha$-mutual information (MI), which identifies the $\alpha$-tilted posterior as the robust belief update and establishes the

industry.title: Demystifying When Pruning Works via Representation Hierarchies
industry.content:
arXiv:2603.24652v3 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: Network pruning, which removes less important parameters or architectures, is often expected to improve efficiency while preserving performance. However, this expectation does not consistently hold across language tasks: pruned models can perform well on non-generative tasks but frequently fail in generative settings. To understand this discrepancy, we analyze network pruning from a representation-hierarchy perspective, decomposing the i

industry.title: Asymmetric Advantage Modulation Calibrates Entropy Dynamics in RLVR
industry.content:
arXiv:2604.04894v2 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has substantially improved the reasoning ability of large language models (LLMs), but it often suffers from \textit{restricted exploration}, where the policy rapidly concentrates on a narrow set of solutions. A common remedy is entropy regularization, which attempts to preserve exploration by increasing policy entropy. However, for LLM-RL, this intervention is highly sensitive to its

industry.title: Doubly Outlier-Robust Online Infinite Hidden Markov Model
industry.content:
arXiv:2604.14322v2 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: We derive a robust update rule for the online infinite hidden Markov model (iHMM) for when the streaming data contains outliers and the model is misspecified. Leveraging recent advances in generalised Bayesian inference, we define robustness via the posterior influence function (PIF), and provide conditions under which the online iHMM has bounded PIF. Imposing robustness inevitably induces an adaptation lag for regime switching. Our meth

industry.title: Layered Mutability: Continuity and Governance in Persistent Self-Modifying Agents
industry.content:
arXiv:2604.14717v2 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: Persistent language-model agents increasingly combine tool use, tiered memory, reflective prompting, and runtime adaptation. In such systems, behavior is shaped not only by current prompts but by mutable internal conditions that influence future action. This paper introduces layered mutability, a framework for reasoning about that process across five layers: pretraining, post-training alignment, self-narrative, memory, and weight-level a

industry.title: SAND: The Challenge on Speech Analysis for Neurodegenerative Disease Assessment
industry.content:
arXiv:2604.16445v2 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: Recent advances in Artificial Intelligence (AI) and the exploration of noninvasive, objective biomarkers, such as speech signals, have encouraged the development of algorithms to support the early diagnosis of neurodegenerative diseases, including Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis (ALS). Voice changes in subjects suffering from ALS typically manifest as progressive dysarthria, which is a prominent neurodegenerative symptom because it affects

industry.title: Explicit integral representations and quantitative bounds for two-layer ReLU networks
industry.content:
arXiv:2604.23260v2 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: An approach to construct explicit integral representations for two-layer ReLU networks is presented, which provides relatively simple representations for any multivariate polynomial. Quantitative bounds are provided for a particular, sharpened ReLU integral representation, which involves a harmonic extension and a projection. The bounds demonstrate that functions can be approximated with $L^{2}(\mathcal{D})$ errors that do not depend exp

industry.title: Identifiability and Stability of Generative Drifting with Companion-Elliptic Kernel Families
industry.content:
arXiv:2604.24196v2 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: This paper studies the identifiability and stability of drifting fields within the framework of Generative Modeling via Drifting. The motivating question is whether a zero-drift equilibrium identifies the target distribution, and whether an approximate zero drift implies weak distributional convergence. Since the original drifting model employs the Laplace kernel by default, we first analyze why standard Gaussian score-based arguments fa

industry.title: Meta-Learning and Targeted Differential Privacy to Improve the Accuracy-Privacy Trade-off in Recommendations
industry.content:
arXiv:2604.26390v2 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: Balancing differential privacy (DP) with recommendation accuracy is a key challenge in privacy-preserving recommender systems, since DP-noise degrades accuracy. We address this trade-off at both the data and model levels. At the data level, we apply DP only to the most stereotypical user data likely to reveal sensitive attributes, such as gender or age, to reduce unnecessary perturbation; we refer to this as targeted DP. At the model lev

industry.title: The Model Knows, the Decoder Finds: Future Value Guided Particle Power Sampling
industry.content:
arXiv:2605.02427v2 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: A recurring pattern in "reasoning without training" is that base LLMs already assign non-trivial probability mass to correct multi-step solutions; the bottleneck is locating these modes efficiently at inference time. Power sampling provides a principled way to bias decoding toward such modes by targeting p_theta(x)^alpha with alpha > 1, but practical approximations must account for future-dependent correction factors that determine which

industry.title: One Operator for Many Densities: Amortized Approximation of Conditioning by Neural Operators
industry.content:
arXiv:2605.06873v2 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: Probabilistic conditioning is concerned with the identification of a distribution of a random variable $X$ given a random variable $Y$. It is a cornerstone of scientific and engineering applications where modeling uncertainty is key. This problem has traditionally been addressed in machine learning by directly learning the conditional distribution of a fixed joint distribution. This paper introduces a novel perspective: we propose to sol

industry.title: Self-Consolidating Language Models: Continual Knowledge Incorporation from Context
industry.content:
arXiv:2605.07076v2 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) increasingly receive information as streams of passages, conversations, and long-context workflows. While longer context windows expose more evidence, they do not ensure that useful information is preserved and reused. We study continual context consolidation: writing current context into model weights while limiting interference with previously consolidated information. We propose \textbf{S}elf-\textbf{Co}ns

industry.title: Learning to Communicate Locally for Large-Scale Multi-Agent Pathfinding
industry.content:
arXiv:2605.07637v2 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: Multi-agent pathfinding (MAPF) is a widely used abstraction for multi-robot trajectory planning problems, where multiple homogeneous agents move simultaneously within a shared environment. Although solving MAPF optimally is NP-hard, scalable and efficient solvers are critical for real-world applications such as logistics and search-and-rescue. To this end, the research community has proposed various decentralized suboptimal MAPF solvers

industry.title: Discriminative Span as a Predictor of Synthetic Data Utility via Classifier Reconstruction
industry.content:
arXiv:2605.09697v2 Announce Type: replace-cross 
Abstract: In many real-world computer vision applications, including medical imaging and industrial inspection, binary classification tasks are characterized by a severe scarcity of positive samples. A widely adopted solution is to generate synthetic positive data using image-to-image transformations applied to negative samples. However, a fundamental challenge remains: how can we reliably assess whether such synthetic data will improve downstream

industry.title: Instagram's new 'Instants' feature combines elements from Snapchat and BeReal
industry.content: Instagram正式推出名为「Instants」的新功能，融合了Snapchat的限时展示和BeReal的随机打卡机制，用户可以发布每日限时快照并在24小时后自动消失。这是Meta在Z世代社交产品竞争中的又一次「复制粘贴」策略——字节跳动的Lemon8和BeReal都在蚕食Instagram的年轻用户基础。对普通用户而言，功能越多意味着产品越重，但这恰恰不是Z世代想要的方向。
industry.quote: Instagram又抄了，这次把Snapchat和BeReal拼在一起——产品经理的工作就是用Ctrl+C和Ctrl+V。

industry.title: Geothermal startup Fervo Energy pops 33% in IPO debut fueled by AI data center demand
industry.content: 地热能源创业公司Fervo Energy上市首日大涨33%，市值飙升至约80亿美元，核心驱动因素是AI数据中心的巨大能源需求。Fervo采用增强型地热系统（EGS）技术，能在地下数千米深处钻探并循环水来获取地热能，相比太阳能和风能，具备全天候稳定供电优势。对微软、谷歌等每天在愁数据中心电力的云厂商来说，地热可能是基荷电力的最佳解决方案——前提是成本能降到与天然气竞争的水平。
industry.quote: 地热公司IPO涨33%，AI救活的不只是芯片公司，还有一度被认为太贵的清洁能源。

industry.title: Ransomware hackers claim breach at Foxconn, a major electronics manufacturer for Apple, Google, and Nvidia
industry.content: 勒索软件组织声称入侵富士康内部系统，窃取了涉及苹果、谷歌、英伟达等客户的生产数据。作为全球最大消费电子代工商，一旦泄露坐实，从iPhone到GPU的生产流程信息都将暴露。这是富士康2020年后最严重的攻击事件，再次证明品牌方安全做得再好，供应链代工厂才是最薄弱的突破口。
industry.quote: 代工厂被黑——品牌方安全做得再好，也敌不过供应链的猪队友。

industry.title: Amazon launches an AI shopping assistant for the search bar, powered by Alexa+
industry.content: 亚马逊在搜索栏中正式上线AI购物助手，由Alexa+提供支持，用户可以通过自然语言对话完成商品搜索、比较和购买决策。与阿里巴巴的千问接入淘宝类似，亚马逊也在将AI对话能力嵌入电商核心搜索入口。这意味着电商搜索正从「关键词匹配」进化到「意图理解」，商家需要重新思考商品的描述方式和SEO策略——过去优化标题关键词就够了，现在还得学会让AI「理解」你的产品。
industry.quote: 亚马逊也上了AI购物助手——以后买东西是比谁的AI更会替你做决定。

industry.title: Anthropic courts a new kind of customer: small business owners
industry.content: Anthropic正在调整市场策略，从服务大企业扩展到面向小微企业和个体工商户推出轻量级AI服务方案。这意味着Claude将从高大上的「企业级AI助手」扩展到能帮小餐馆老板优化菜单、帮独立设计师写文案的普惠AI工具。这步棋既是对OpenAI在中小企业市场扩张的回应，也是Anthropic寻找新增长点的尝试——大企业合同周期长、决策复杂，而小微企业只需要一张信用卡就能用起来。
industry.quote: Anthropic开始讨好小商家了——以前只跟财富500强喝茶，现在终于发现开面馆的也交钱。

industry.title: Suspected Sabotage of Deep-Sea Cable Triggers First NATO-Led Response
industry.content: 一条连接欧洲与亚洲的关键深海通信电缆疑似遭到蓄意破坏，触发北约首次启动集体响应机制。全球95%以上的洲际通信依赖海底光缆，一旦关键节点被破坏，跨国金融服务、云计算数据传输和社交媒体都将受到严重影响。此次事件标志着数字基础设施的物理安全正式进入地缘博弈的核心议题——过去大家只担心网络攻击，现在连海底的物理设施也不安全了。
industry.quote: 海底光缆被搞，北约出动——最脆弱的地方不在云端，在海底。

industry.title: Leading China Property Developer Reports Huge Loss, in Sign of Widening Real-Estate Woes
industry.content: 中国一家头部房企发布巨额亏损财报，标志房地产危机从「激进玩家」蔓延到了「最稳健的头部企业」。曾被视作行业最后堡垒的开发商也无法免疫，说明市场调整远未触底。对科技行业而言，地产下行释放大量软件人才流向AI领域，但地产相关的企业服务和数字化支出也将继续萎缩。
industry.quote: 连最稳的房企都爆了——地产的坑有多深，看看财报就知道了。

industry.title: 林俊旸创业，新公司估值约20亿美金丨智能涌现独家
industry.content: 原阿里通义千问大模型负责人林俊旸正式创业，新公司估值约20亿美元。他主导了通义千问系列模型研发，出走被视为中国AI「大厂高管创业潮」的标志事件。20亿美元起步估值说明资本抢人比抢技术更急迫——但离开大厂的算力和数据护城河后，独立生存才是真考验。
industry.quote: 林俊旸出来单干，估值20亿——大厂走一个高管，资本市场就追着投一个。

industry.title: 清华系光计算芯片企业完成数千万天使轮融资，瞄准全波光计算架构
industry.content: 一家源自清华的光计算芯片创业公司完成数千万元天使轮融资，主攻全波光计算架构，利用光的波动特性而非电流进行计算。光计算能效比电子芯片高数个量级，尤其适合AI推理矩阵运算。虽然商业化还需数年，但清华系入局意味着中国在「后摩尔时代」计算架构上正加速追赶。
industry.quote: 光计算前途光明——但离赚钱还隔着好几轮融资。

industry.title: Altman forced to confront claims at OpenAI trial that he's a prolific liar
industry.content: 在Musk诉OpenAI的庭审中，Sam Altman被迫面对一系列关于他「习惯性说谎」的指控，包括前OpenAI员工和业界人士提供的匿名证词。这场庭审正在演变成对Altman个人可信度的全面审查，争议焦点在于Altman是否在OpenAI从非营利转向营利的过程中对Musk和早期团队成员做出了与实际安排不符的承诺。无论判决结果如何，Altman的品牌形象已经受到冲击——而一个信誉受损的CEO在争取监管信任时，代价可能比任何罚款都大。
industry.quote: Altman被当众问「你是不是撒谎成性」——AI的天才，诚实评分不及格。

industry.title: OpenAI被FSU枪击案受害者家人起诉，AI责任边界再掀风暴 ⚖️
industry.content: 佛罗里达州立大学枪击案受害者家人正式对OpenAI提起诉讼，指控ChatGPT的「缺陷设计」为袭击者提供了实质性帮助，这是AI工具介入恶性暴力事件的首次法律追责案例。OpenAI回应称其「提供了事实性回答」，不构成鼓励犯罪。法律专家表示，此案将直接测试AI服务商在用户实施犯罪时的连带责任边界——如果AI给出的是「可在公开来源获取的信息」，平台是否可以免责？这一问题将决定整个AI行业的合规框架走向。
industry.quote: AI给了公开信息所以无罪？那菜刀厂商也可以说，我只是卖了把刀。

industry.title: OpenAI成立140亿美元「部署公司」，企业AI落地战开打 🏢
industry.content: OpenAI宣布成立专项「部署公司」（The Deployment Company），估值100亿美元，已获40亿美元投资，专门帮助其他企业构建、测试和部署AI系统。这是OpenAI从模型提供商向企业解决方案提供商转型的关键一步，意味着AI落地服务正式成为一门独立生意。对IBM、埃森哲等传统IT咨询公司来说，一个拥有最强基础模型的对手正在抢他们的午餐。
industry.quote: OpenAI不只卖铲子了，现在连金矿都帮人挖——咨询公司集体打了个寒颤。

industry.title: 理想汽车具身智能路线图：EMB+800V悬架+线控转向三位一体 🚗
industry.content: 理想汽车整车研发负责人刘立国罕见接受专访，系统阐释了理想「具身智能」战略的核心技术拼图：历时四年自研量产EMB线控机械制动（全球首个量产）、800V主动悬架和完全体线控底盘，实现三者在自研软件架构下的协同。他首次披露这三个系统的软件全部自研，打破了供应商黑盒壁垒，并将整车控制芯片算力提升至100-200TOPS，定位「小脑」角色与智驾「大脑」深度融合。理想的目标是让底盘成为机器人级别的高精度执行终端，而非简单的出行工具。
industry.quote: 大家都以为理想只会造沙发，没想到他们在闷声造机器人——李想的底牌比脸书还深。

industry.title: SK海力士「人均610万奖金」乌龙背后：HBM行情还能火多久？ 💎
industry.content: 国际投行麦格理证券预测SK海力士若2027年营业利润达标，员工人均奖金可达约610万人民币，这一数字在中国社交媒体疯传后，SK海力士紧急澄清「年度业绩尚未确定，奖金规模无法预测」。这背后是SK海力士HBM内存被OpenAI、AWS等大客户疯抢的现实——但市场真正关心的是：这波HBM行情还能持续多久，SK海力士的产能扩张是否正在被中国存储厂商的崛起所对冲？
industry.quote: 610万是人家的预测，海力士说别当真——韭菜看到数字就高潮，资本已经在撤退了。

industry.title: NVIDIA推出CUDA-Oxide：用Rust写CUDA编译器，AI基础设施层地震中 🦀
industry.content: 英伟达正式发布CUDA-Oxide，这是其官方Rust到CUDA编译器，允许开发者用Rust语言直接编写CUDA核函数。该项目目前在Hacker News上获得235分关注，评论区技术讨论极为活跃。Rust凭借内存安全性和高性能，正在AI基础设施层快速渗透——从操作系统内核到编译器，再到AI框架底层。英伟达此举的意义不仅是工具升级，更是对AI开发生态语言选择权的一次重新宣示。
industry.quote: NVIDIA用Rust写CUDA——C++的护城河塌了，前端圈又多了一种可以炫耀的语言。

industry.title: Gmail注册现在要扫码+发短信，隐私激进派被逼入墙角 📱
industry.content: Google悄然更新Gmail注册机制，要求用户扫描二维码并发送短信才能完成注册，这导致没有Android手机或无法使用Google Play Services的用户直接被挡在门外。该话题在Hacker News上以394分成为当日热门，评论普遍认为这是Google对「去Google化」用户的精准打击——你不用我的生态，我就不让你注册我的生态。隐私倡导者将其定性为「数字身份制裁」，反垄断议题再次被点燃。
industry.quote: 你说你要隐私？Google说那你连门都别进——免费的才是最贵的，贵的是尊严。

dev.title: 深入剖析Java内存模型与volatile关键字 - devpotato
dev.content: 缓存一致性问题 计算机在运行程序时，每条指令都是在CPU中执行的，在执行过程中会涉及到数据的读写。我们知道程序运行的数据是存储在主存中，这时就会有一个问题，读写主存中的数据没有 CPU 中执行指令的速度快，如果任何的交互都需要与主存打交道则会大大降低效率，所以就有了 CPU寄存器、各级缓存、主存构成

dev.quote: 每年 npm 都要出几个投毒事件，跟大姨妈一样准时。

dev.content: 打开 Claude Code 让它帮你重构一个 Spring Boot 模块，你以为就是一个对话、一个 API 调用。但实际上，Claude Code 在背后悄悄开了三个独立的子 Agent：一个扫描代码结构，一个分析依赖关系，一个执行具体修改。每个 Agent 是独立的 Claude 实例，各自消
dev.quote: ** Claude Code：你的钱包不归你管，归我管。

dev.title: 🐍 Python 3.14.5 发布，垃圾回收器发生重大变化
dev.content: Python 3.14.5 发布，垃圾回收器发生重大架构变化。作为当前最活跃的主流动态语言之一，Python 的 GC 优化对大量后端系统和数据科学工作负载有直接性能影响。
dev.quote: ** Python 3.14的GC改了，但大家还在用3.10，你改给谁看？

dev.title: 🤔 如果 AI 替你写代码，为什么还用 Python？
dev.content:
Article URL: https://medium.com/@NMitchem/if-ai-writes-your-code-why-use-python-bf8c4ba1a055
Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48100433
Points: 398
# Comments: 410
dev.quote: ** AI写代码后你还坚持用Python，跟有了计算器还打算盘有什么区别？

dev.title: 🧠 AI 写代码，脑子却空了：代理编码时代的认知债务危机
dev.content: 本文探讨了AI辅助开发中产生的“认知债务”与技能退化问题，分析了代理编码的陷阱，并提供了如何避免被AI架空的实践建议。
dev.quote: ** AI越写越强，你越写越菜，你们的差距在拉大。

dev.title: 🔀 9router：免费连接 40+ 模型供应商的 AI 编码路由工具
dev.content: 9router 是一个免费的 AI 编码路由工具，可连接 40+ 模型供应商。开发者无需绑定单一模型服务商，即可在编码工作流中按需切换和组合不同 LLM 提供商，提升开发灵活性和容灾能力。
dev.quote: ** 40个模型免费路由，这不比给Claude充月卡香？

dev.title: 🏗️ 字节跳动开源 UI-TARS-desktop：多模态 AI Agent 栈
dev.content: 字节跳动开源 UI-TARS-desktop 多模态 AI Agent 框架。UI-TARS 通过视觉理解能力直接操作桌面应用界面，将 AI Agent 从纯文本交互扩展到图形界面场景。
dev.quote: ** 字节又开源了，这次抄什么…哦不是，是原创。

ai.title: 🧠 Needle：26M 参数工具调用模型，蒸馏 Gemini 3.1 跑在手表上
ai.content: 从 Gemini 3.1 蒸馏出仅 26M 参数的 Simple Attention Network，专门用于单次工具调用（single-shot function call）。最大亮点是权重复合开源，可在 Mac/PC 本地微调，生产环境预填达到 6000 tok/s、解码 1200 tok/s。在消费级设备（手机、手表、眼镜）上对比 FunctionGemma-270M、Qwen-0.6B 等更大模型表现出竞争力。对追求边缘 AI 和 on-device AI 的开发者，这是当前最小的可用工具调用方案。
ai.quote: 大模型卷不动了开始卷纳米模型 🔥

ai.title: 🖱️ DeepMind 重新发明鼠标指针：AI Pointer 点一下就知道你要什么
ai.content: DeepMind 发布 AI Pointer 概念，重新定义计算机最基础的交互元素——鼠标指针。四个交互原则：保持工作流不打断（无需切换到 AI 窗口）、看图说话（AI 自动理解指针所指内容）、支持「这个」「那个」的自然简略表达、将像素转化为可操作实体。已集成到 Chrome 和 Googlebook 笔记本中，用 Gemini 驱动。对于所有日常电脑使用者而言，这是 AI 原生 UI 的里程碑式设计。
ai.quote: 五十年不变的小箭头终于要成精了 🔥

ai.title: ⚖️ Anthropic 发布 20+ 法律行业 MCP 连接器，Claude 全面接入法律科技栈
ai.content: Anthropic 为 Claude 发布 20+ 个 MCP 连接器，覆盖合同生命周期系统（Definely）、文档管理（DocuSign、Box）、研究平台（Thomson Reuters）、电子取证（Harvey）等，同时推出 12 个垂直领域插件和 Word/Outlook/Excel/PowerPoint 深度集成。法律专业人士已成为 Claude Cowork 最活跃用户群体。Claude 还通过 Free Law Project 等公益组织推动法律普惠。对法律科技从业者和企业法务团队影响深远。
ai.quote: 律师终于可以跟AI说人话而不是写prompt 🔥

ai.title: 🔬 SenseNova-U1：商汤统一图文理解与生成，NEO-unify 架构登场
ai.content: 商汤发布 SenseNova-U1，基于 NEO-unify 架构的完全统一多模态理解与生成模型。核心突破：理解和生成不再走两条孤立管线，共享同一个表征空间。8B-MoT 和 A3B-MoT 两个变体在传统 VLM 基准上匹敌纯理解模型，同时具备高保真图生能力，在 X2I 合成、文字密集型图表生成、交错图文生成等任务上表现优异。初步证据表明该架构还能扩展到 VLA 和世界模型场景。
ai.quote: 理解派和生成派打了几年的架终于被商汤劝和了 🔥

ai.title: 🤖 World Action Models：具身 AI 的下一个前沿，综述统一世界模型与动作生成
ai.content: 综述性论文系统性定义了「世界动作模型」（WAM）新范式——将世界模型（预测物理环境演化）与动作生成统一为联合概率分布，区别于传统 VLA 模型的纯反应式观察-动作映射。论文由复旦、港大等机构合作完成，梳理了碎片化的文献脉络，澄清了 WAM 与相关概念的边界。对于机器人学习和具身 AI 领域的学者与工程师，这是理解该方向最佳的统一理论框架。
ai.quote: 让机器人不光会动还得会预测动完世界啥样 🔥

ai.title: 📊 Gallup 正式研究 AI 模拟人类调查：合成响应替代真人问卷
ai.content: 全球知名民调机构 Gallup 宣布与 AI 公司 Simile 合作，研究用 AI 模拟生成「合成调查响应」。其目标不是替代基于概率抽样的严谨调查，而是探索 AI 模拟能否加深对人类思维与行为的理解。Simile 的 AI 模拟方法将接受 Gallup 的独立验证。这对市场调研、产品研究、社会科学领域意味着样本获取方式可能的范式转变——AI 可以模拟特定人群的反馈。
ai.quote: 以后市场调研不是问真人而是问AI：人类终于可以清静了 🔥

ai.title: 🐑 Shepherd：Meta-Agent 运行框架，用 Lean 证明器给 Agent 环境做版本控制
ai.content: Meta-Agent 系统（Agent 操控 Agent）面临两大工程难题：Agent 状态难以追踪回滚、多 Agent 并行探索时计算成本爆炸。Shepherd 提出将 Meta-Agent 操作形式化为函数，用 Lean 证明语言机械化核心操作，并记录每次 Agent-环境交互为带类型的 Git-like 执行 trace。在这种形式化下，任何历史状态都可以 fork 并回放——比 Docker fork 快 5 倍，prompt 缓存复用率达 95% 以上。在 TerminalBench-2 上，Tree-RL fork 策略将任务完成率从 34.2% 提升到 39.4%；pair coding 场景 supervisor 干预使通过率从 28.8% 升至 54.7%。这对需要高可靠 Agent 协作的研究和工程团队是基础设施级别的贡献，已开源。
ai.quote: 数学公式推完发现业务逻辑没对过

ai.title: 🎬 WorldReasonBench：视频生成模型是"世界模拟器"吗？首个物理对齐压力测试来了
ai.content: Seedance2.0、Veo3.1 等商业视频生成系统已能生成高度逼真动态场景，学界开始讨论视频生成器是否在演化为"世界模拟器"，但此前缺乏系统性验证框架。WorldReasonBench 从人类Aligned 的角度出发，将视频生成器视为未来世界状态预测器进行压力测试，考察模型在长程物理交互、因果链条、多实体碰撞等场景的合理性。揭示了当前最强商业系统在物理可信度上的具体短板，为视频生成进入科学模拟、机器人规划等高可靠性场景提供了首个严格评测基准。
ai.quote: 画面精美如电影物理常识如小孩涂鸦

ai.title: 🖼️ Qwen-Image-2.0：统一图文生成与编辑，单一框架搞定高保真图像创作
ai.content: 图像生成和编辑长期被视为两个独立任务——前者追求创造力，后者追求精确控制。Qwen-Image-2.0 试图用单一统一模型同时搞定：既能在高分辨率下生成逼真图像，又能基于指令对图像特定区域进行精准编辑，保持风格和身份一致性。该工作在多个图文生成和编辑 benchmark 上验证了统一的可行性，减少了部署多个专用模型的工程成本。对需要一站式图像创作/编辑能力的应用层团队值得关注。
ai.quote: 画画改图都会干就是样样半斤八两

ai.title: 📐 Soohak：数学家出题评测LLM研究级数学能力，比 IMO 更难的新基准
ai.content: LLM 在 IMO（国际数学奥林匹克）拿金牌的消息余温尚存，但业界已经意识到 IMO 评测存在上限过低、与真实研究数学脱节的问题。Soohak 由数学家亲自出题，构建面向研究级数学能力的新基准——题目更开放、证明链条更长、跨领域综合要求更高，不存在标准答案可供背诵。在这套更难、更接近真实学术场景的题目上对前沿 LLM 进行系统评测，揭示当前模型在研究级数学推理上的真实差距。对推动 LLM 数学能力向科研渗透有重要参考价值。
ai.quote: IMO满分选手来做新题直接破防

ai.title: 📄 Dystruct：扩散语言模型的动态结构化解码，无需重训练即可变长输出
ai.content: 扩散语言模型（DLM）以并行解码著称，但主流方案需要预先指定输出长度，严重限制了在开放式问答、长文档生成等真实场景的灵活性。已有的一些变长方案要么需要昂贵重训练，要么只依赖局部置信度信号，容易产生语义不连贯。Dystruct 提出了无需训练的贝叶斯结构化解码框架，将输出长度、块边界和解码调度联合建模为动态结构推理过程，每步融合局部不确定性与结构化信号，实现灵活块扩展。在多个基准测试上，生成质量和灵活性均超越固定长度和现有变长基线。
ai.quote: 想说多久就说多久不用送回厂重装

ai.title: 🌍 SimWorld Studio：Unreal Engine 5 生成可自进化 3D 机器人训练世界
ai.content: 代码 Agent 有沙盒，机器人 Agent 却只能靠手绘场景训练——这是 Embodied AI 领域的老大难问题。SimWorld Studio 构建在 Unreal Engine 5 上的开源平台，核心是 SimCoder 工具增强型编码 Agent：接收语言/图像指令，写 UE5 代码生成物理真实的 3D 交互环境，并通过编译器反馈、VLM 评审等自进化完善环境和技能库。生成 Gym 风格环境用于 Agent 训练，并支持环境- Agent 共演化：Agent 进步后系统自动提升环境难度。具身导航案例中，共演化策略比固定环境训练成功率提升 18 点，比无训练 Agent 提升 40 点。
ai.quote: 在游乐场玩耍的人类在工位燃烧自己

ai.title: 🎮 G-Zero：无需任何数据，从零开始的自博弈开放式内容生成
ai.content: LLM 在可验证领域（代码解题、数学证明）已经能自演化，但在开放式任务（写作、创意生成）中，自演化依赖 LLM judge 做 proxy 评估，存在能力瓶颈和 reward hacking 问题。G-Zero 提出完全从零开始的 self-play 框架：无需任何外部数据或 LLM judge，直接通过双代理对称博弈让模型自主发现和优化开放式生成策略。在开放式写作、对话生成等任务上，G-Zero 超越依赖外部 judge 的自演化基线，且不存在 reward hacking 问题。为开放式生成任务的自训练提供了全新范式。
ai.quote: 不靠资料不靠人类AI空手套出满分

ai.title: 🏷️ Auto-Rubric as Reward：把隐式偏好变成可验证标准，多模态对齐新思路
ai.content: 多模态生成模型对齐的最大痛点：标量奖励或 pairwise 标签过于稀疏，无法提供细粒度优化信号，导致 reward hacking。Auto-Rubric as Reward（ARR）将 LLM 内部化的偏好知识外化为 prompt 特异的评分 rubric——把模糊的人类意图拆解成独立可验证的质量维度，zero-shot 即可部署。训练阶段用 Rubric Policy Optimization（RPO）将多维 rubric 蒸馏为鲁棒二值奖励，替代不透明标量回归。在文生图和图像编辑 benchmark 上，ARR-RPO 超越 pairwise reward model 和 VLM judge，且解决了位置偏见等评估偏差问题。
ai.quote: AI的小心思终于被抓出来做成评分表

ai.title: 🔬 VLM 可靠性不在注意力图里：3-7B 模型的隐藏状态才是答案
ai.content: 学界长期有个直觉：VLM 的 attention map 越 sharp，模型越可靠。但本研究用 VLM Reliability Probe（VRP）系统性地证伪了这个假设：注意力结构对正确性的预测能力接近零（pooled R_pb = 0.001），即使注意力被完全破坏（top-30% patch masking）准确率也只下降 8-11pp。真正可靠的是 hidden-state geometry：单层 hidden-state linear probe 在 POPE 上达 AUROC > 0.95。进一步发现架构差异巨大：LLaVA 的可靠性集中在单一脆弱的后期瓶颈，而 PaliGemma 和 Qwen2-VL 分布式地分散在早期层，即使破坏 50% hidden dimension 也只下降 1pp。对 VLM 监控和可解释性设计有直接工程指导意义。
ai.quote: 盯了半天的沙盘原来只是AI的吉祥物

ai.title: 🛒 SalesSim + UserGRPO：LLM 零售用户模拟器终于知道自己是谁了
ai.content: 多模态 LLM 驱动的零售对话系统需要真实用户模拟器来训练销售 Agent，但现有方案把用户模拟当成表层对话生成——完全忽略了真实消费者有多复杂：多维度背景、偏好、dealbreaker 都不一样。SalesSim 将用户模拟重新定义为基于 Agent 的 grounded 决策过程，评测 6 个 SOTA 模型发现即使最强模型也仅有不到 79% persona 对齐度，且容易被销售 Agent 说服带偏。提出 UserGRPO——多轮多目标 RL recipe，同时优化对话流畅度和 persona 对齐，基线提升 13.8%。对电商对话系统训练和评估有直接价值。
ai.quote: 装了一年人类终于承认是代码成精

startup.title: Kevin Hartz's A* just closed its third fund with $450 million
startup.content: 早期风投机构A* Capital宣布完成4.5亿美元第三期基金募集。创始人Kevin Hartz（X.com早期投资人、PayPal前董事）再次出手，专注种子轮到A轮的AI和基础设施投资。该基金LP包括主权财富基金和家族办公室，在当前募资寒冬中逆势完成超大额募资，说明一线GP仍具强大吸金能力。中小创业者或许能从中看到新的资金来源机会。
startup.quote: 4.5亿不是终点，是新一轮抢项目的筹码

startup.title: Former Tesla exec and Heron Power CEO Drew Baglino has founded a heat pump startup
startup.content: 特斯拉前高管Drew Baglino在离开工作20年后，创立了名为Sadi Thermal Machines的热泵公司。Baglino曾是特斯拉功率器件和Heron Power的负责人，在能源tech领域有深厚积累。热泵技术用于建筑供暖和制冷，是实现碳中和的关键技术之一。相比特斯拉Solar Roof等业务，热泵更偏向B2B基础设施赛道。
startup.quote: 特斯拉系创业者的清洁能源梦，比PPT投资人靠谱多了

startup.title: Musk mulled handing OpenAI to his children, Altman testifies
startup.content: 在OpenAI与马斯克的诉讼案中，Altman作证称马斯克曾讨论将OpenAI交给其子女管理，并称这段对话"令人毛骨悚然"。这场从去年持续到现在的法律战已耗费双方大量资源，但本质上是对OpenAI从非营利转为营利架构的不满。马斯克已提交竞购要约想将OpenAI收归己有，官司背后是AI主权之争。
startup.quote: 一个要把AI开源的人，想把AI传给亲儿子，双标玩得溜

startup.title: Anthropic warns investors against secondary platforms offering access to its shares
startup.content: AI安全公司Anthropic向投资者发出正式警告，点名Open Doors Partners、Unicorns Exchange等平台未经授权提供其股权二级市场交易。Anthropic表示这些平台存在估值虚高、流动性差等风险。此前OpenAI和Stripe也发布过类似警告。背后逻辑：头部AI公司股权僧多粥少，二级市场出现溢价泡沫，一级市场投资人反而要提醒韭菜别被割。
startup.quote: 自己股票卖不出去，却警告别人别买，这是哪门子做慈善

startup.title: Potholes cost cities millions: This company is using AI and trucks to fix them
startup.content: fleet管理公司Samsara开发了一套基于AI的道路病害检测系统，通过安装在货车上的传感器和摄像头自动识别坑洼和裂缝，再配合施工团队进行修复。美国城市每年因道路损坏损失数十亿美元，这套方案将检测效率大幅提升。相比烧钱的AI大模型，这种垂直场景落地的卷王更容易拿到政府合同。
startup.quote: 卖卡车数据顺便修路，比吹牛的大模型公司实在

startup.title: Sam Altman says Elon Musk's mind games were damaging OpenAI
startup.content: Altman在法庭证词中详细描述了Musk如何通过反复无常的谈判和威胁来干扰OpenAI运营，包括多次改变收购要约条款、在媒体放话施压。他用"尤其令人不寒而栗"形容其中一段对话。OpenAI指控马斯克曾试图通过持续干扰来削弱公司，最终目标是让OpenAI回归非营利结构或被其收购。此案预计今年秋季开庭。
startup.quote: Altman终于把积攒多年的苦水倒出来了

startup.title: Android Auto is now one (screen) size fits all
startup.content: Google在I/O大会上宣布Android Auto重大更新，从此不再依赖车机屏幕尺寸和分辨率，不同尺寸的中控屏都能自动适配。新的Liquid Glass设计语言让界面更流畅，并增强了语音助手和导航的集成度。对于汽车OEM厂商来说，不再需要针对不同屏幕做定制化适配，降低了开发成本，也意味着Android车机生态的标准化又进了一步。
startup.quote: Google终于明白：不是每辆车都配得起15寸大屏

startup.title: Google announces its Chromebook successor: the Googlebook
startup.content: Google在I/O上意外预告了名为Googlebook的全新笔记本产品线，定位为Chromebook的继任者，秋季上市。采用铝合金机身和深度定制的Android系统，目标是打造真正的"廉价高端"笔记本体验。Google内部将其视为对标苹果生态的关键硬件产品。对于教育市场和新兴市场来说，这可能是一款走量产品，但Chromebook的口碑能复制到Googlebook上吗？
startup.quote: Chromebook改名换姓也还是Chromebook，Google这品牌溢价堪忧

startup.title: The 9 biggest new features in Android 17
startup.content: Android 17在Google I/O上发布，9大新功能包括：AI生成桌面小组件、改进的分屏多任务、更智能的Liquid Glass视觉风格、全新隐私指示器、卫星通信支持等。Google特别强调了Gemini AI助手与Android系统的深度整合，可以帮助用户自动回复邮件、预订餐厅、管理日程。Android 17的AI落地比往年更激进，但也意味着对硬件要求更高，老机型升级体验可能打折。
startup.quote: AI小组件或许实用，但别指望它拯救你的低配手机

startup.title: Gemini's latest updates are all about controlling your phone
startup.content: Google在I/O大会上推出Gemini Intelligence功能，定位为"手机控制大脑"——帮你填表、帮你回信息、帮你预约。Gemini可以直接读取屏幕内容并执行操作，是从"问答助手"到"执行助手"的质变。对用户隐私和安全的担忧也随之而来： Gemini到底能看多少你的数据？Google表示所有AI处理都在本地完成，但这个承诺的可信度存疑。
startup.quote: 能帮你做事的前提是能看到你的一切，这买卖划算吗

startup.title: Helsing AI防务融资12亿美元，估值180亿——防务科技成投资新欢
startup.content: 欧洲AI防务新创Helsing即将完成12亿美元融资，估值达180亿美元，投资方包括Spotify创始人Daniel Ek等。Helsing专注于AI驱动的无人机、防务软件平台，服务于德国、法国等北约盟国军队。随着俄乌战争持续，欧洲各国国防预算急速膨胀，AI防务赛道从"边缘赛道"升级为"核心资产"，传统军火商和科技巨头的防线正在被打破。

startup.title: Digg复活转型AI新闻聚合器——Web 2.0遗老的第三次赌注
startup.content: 曾被视为Reddit前身的老牌新闻聚合平台Digg宣布第三次复活，这次定位为AI新闻聚合器。Digg曾在2006年凭借用户投票算法击败Google News，后因改版失败被Reddit超越。如今信息过载问题比当年更严重，AI能否解决人类判断力稀缺的核心矛盾，还是又一个"AI包装"的概念泡沫，需要打一个大问号。

startup.title: TikTok英国推出无广告订阅——先收广告费再收订阅费
startup.content: TikTok在英国推出付费无广告订阅服务，用户付费后将不再看到任何广告，且其数据不会被用于广告推荐目的。这是继YouTube Premium之后又一主流短视频平台拥抱订阅制，标志着平台从"广告商补贴用户"向"用户自己买单"转变。对于厌倦算法推荐的英国用户，每月订阅费将是他们夺回注意力的代价。

startup.title: Apple为iPhone引入加密RCS消息——欧洲监管拆掉十年城墙
startup.content: Apple在iOS 26.5中正式支持与Android用户之间的端对端加密RCS消息，这意味着Apple和Google均无法读取跨平台消息内容。背后推手是欧盟《数字市场法案》对互操作性的强制要求，倒逼Apple放弃十年封闭生态护城河。对于用户而言，绿蓝气泡终于可以统一颜色，但背后的数据控制权争夺才刚刚开始。

startup.title: Bruin：与团队协同的企业级AI数据智能体
startup.content: ProductHunt新品Bruin定位为"企业级AI数据智能体"，主打多团队成员协同场景下的数据分析与决策支持，能够对接企业数据库、Slack、CRM等工具自动生成分析报告并推动工作流。在企业数据孤岛严重的现状下，Bruin试图扮演"数据翻译官"角色，让非技术背景的业务人员也能直接对话数据。AI原生架构正在从单点工具向协作平台演进。

startup.title: Cowoboy Space融资2.75亿美元建太空数据中心——火箭不够用才是最大bug
startup.content: AI算力需求爆发让数据中心创业者把目光投向太空，Cowboy Space宣布融资2.75亿美元用于建设太空数据中心。但核心问题在于：现有火箭运力根本不足以支持大规模轨道数据中心部署，且发射成本仍然高企。这不是太空数据中心的元年，而是"画饼充饥"的元年——愿景宏大，基础设施差距十年起步。

startup.title: 德州起诉Netflix广告欺诈——"永无广告"的承诺值多少钱
startup.content: 德州总检察长起诉Netflix，指控其违背"永无广告"的承诺，并向广告技术公司开放用户数据访问，特别是儿童数据。这是流媒体平台"付费订阅+数据变现"双轨模式面临的最大监管挑战。若诉讼成立，Netflix将面临巨额赔偿，其广告业务模式可能被要求重构。说好的无广告呢？

startup.title: GM了结加州隐私诉讼，支付1275万美元和解金
startup.content: 通用汽车同意支付1275万美元和解金，了结加州执法机构提起的隐私诉讼。该诉讼指控GM将车主的驾驶习惯数据出售给保险公司和数据经纪商，用于保险费率定价。智能汽车已成为移动数据采集器，本次和解将倒逼车企重新审视数据变现边界。数据即保险费率的时代来临，车主正在被自己的驾驶习惯反噬。

startup.title: 百济神州一季度扭亏为盈，营收105亿元同比增长31%
startup.content: 百济神州发布2026年一季度财报，营业收入105.44亿元，同比增长31%，归母净利润16.08亿元实现扭亏。业绩增长主要受益于创新药产品管线放量和费用管控效率提升。作为全球化步伐最快的中国创新药企，百济神州从"烧钱研发"走向"规模盈利"的路径正在被验证，对中国创新药行业具有标杆意义。

startup.title: 余轶南创立维他动力获行业最大单笔融资——自动驾驶大牛下凡消费机器人
startup.content: 地平线创始团队001号员工余轶南于2024年底创立"维他动力"，致力于将自动驾驶领域积累的AI感知和决策能力迁移到消费级机器人赛道。知情人士透露该笔融资为行业最大单笔早期融资。维他动力的核心逻辑是：自动驾驶的传感器融合和规划能力在家庭服务机器人场景存在巨大复用空间，且市场天花板远高于汽车。 > 🔥 信源：TechCrunch / 36氪 / The Verge / Product Hunt > ⏰ 生成时间：2026-05-12 03:35 UTC

design.title: Whale Starts
design.content: 一个能复制任意网页设计风格的建站工具。输入目标网站链接，Whale Starts 即可提取其设计风格并生成可编辑的网站模板。适合需要快速搭建美观站点但不擅长从零设计的创业者、设计师和中小团队，大幅缩短从灵感上线的周期。
design.quote: 复制设计不叫创新，叫高级扒皮。

design.title: EmailTemple
design.content: AI驱动的品牌邮件设计工作室。用自然语言描述需求，即可生成符合品牌视觉规范的高转化邮件模板，支持拖拽微调。面向营销团队和独立创作者，解决邮件设计与品牌一致性难以兼顾的痛点，让每一封营销邮件都保持专业质感。
design.quote: 祈祷AI别把你的品牌色配成番茄炒蛋。

design.title: The death of the empty state in AI products
design.content: AI产品抛弃了20年来空状态设计的研究积累，把所有首次体验简化为一个闪烁的提示框。文章用真实数据（70%首周流失率）揭示了空白文本框作为唯一入口的设计缺陷，并对比了Notion、Figma等产品在空状态上的精耕细作。写给AI产品经理和UX设计师，提醒「极简不等于不设计」。
design.quote: AI产品经理：空状态？不存在的，用户会自己摸索。

design.title: The prompt is not an interface
design.content: 本文尖锐指出AI工具把用户拉回了命令行时代——从直接操作的可视化界面倒退到纯文本交互。作者借用John Berger的「看先于说」论证视觉界面为何不可替代，并反思AI产品设计中的交互退化。适合所有关注AI产品交互范式、人机交互历史的设计师和产品负责人。
design.quote: 花了四十年告别命令行，AI一秒让你梦回DOS。

design.title: Be like water: Rethinking the design process with AI
design.content: 用李小龙「似水哲学」重新思考AI时代的设计流程。文章批判了行业内盲目追逐AI指标（token消耗量等「虚荣指标」），主张设计师在工具快速迭代中保持「有意图的流动」而非机械复用提示词模板。写给在AI浪潮中感到焦虑、想真正理解如何将AI融入设计流程的UX从业者。
design.quote: 水能载舟，也能让你在提示词里溺水而亡。

design.title: The UX Designer's Nightmare: When "Production-Ready" Becomes A Design Deliverable
design.content: AI时代下UX设计师的岗位职责正在被重新定义——企业要求设计师同时交付设计与代码。文章剖析了「速度优先于体验」给行业带来的危机，提醒设计师回归用户体验守护者的角色。适读人群：UX/UI设计师、设计管理者、产品团队。
design.quote: 老板：你不仅要画得美，还得自己写代码实现。

design.title: Session Timeouts: The Overlooked Accessibility Barrier In Authentication Design
design.content: 会话超时这个看似平常的设计问题，实际上是对残障用户（运动障碍、认知障碍）的严重无障碍壁垒。文章深入分析了超时机制如何影响全球13亿残障人士，并给出了更包容的会话管理实践方案。适读人群：前端工程师、UX设计师、无障碍合规负责人。
design.quote: 13亿人被你的登录超时页折磨，恭喜你创造了最大障碍。

design.title: The golden age of women's sports branding is here, and designers are leading it.
design.content: 深度分析女子运动品牌设计正在经历的黄金时代。从WNBA扩张球队的视觉系统到Dribbble上的运动品牌概念作品，文章揭示这一领域不再局限于队服和标志，而是延伸至数字、零售、社区空间。对于品牌设计师和插画师来说，这是一个快速增长的全新设计前沿。
design.quote: 女子运动终于不用穿粉色凑合了，谢天谢地。

design.title: Discovery is the work AI gives back
design.content: Gale Robins引用McKinsey最新研究：九成组织已采用AI，但94%尚未看到显著价值，根源在于把所有AI应用都钉在了「生产力提升」第一个波浪上。他指出一个危险的模式：团队用AI把发现周期从六周压缩到十天，但问的问题完全没变——只是更快地得到相同的答案。真正的价值在第二、第三波浪：差异化（AI使能新商业模式）和交易成本降低。斯坦福研究发现AI对新手提升34%、对资深员工几乎无效——AI提升的是地板而非天花板。
design.quote: ** 压缩发现周期不等于改变发现的问题——快了但没换问题，等于白快。

design.title: Identifying Necessary Transparency Moments In Agentic AI (Part 1)
design.content: Victor Yocco引入了一个更务实的AI透明度方法论：在「完全黑盒」和「数据倾倒」两个极端之间找到平衡。他提出了「决策节点审计（Decision Node Audit）」框架，配合Impact/Risk矩阵来决定何时向用户展示AI决策过程、何时应该隐藏。文章覆盖了Agentic AI场景下的具体透明节点识别方法，对设计AI智能体的UX设计师和产品经理至关重要——用户不需要知道AI的全部，但必须知道关键的下一步。
design.quote: ** 黑盒不行，数据倾倒也不对——AI透明的正确姿势是「关键时刻告知」。

design.title: The 'Bug-Free' Workforce: How AI Is Disrupting The Interactions That Build Strong Teams
design.content: Casey Hudetz和Eric Olive揭示了一个反直觉的AI副作用：当AI完美解答了你的所有问题，你不再需要「麻烦」同事。但那些非正式的打扰恰恰是建立团队信任、归属感和创新的社交脚手架——MIT数据显示从非正式互动中团队成功率提升35%。文章引用Google Project Aristotle和McKinsey的离职研究（每年228-355M美元成本），警告AI效率带来的社交成本正悄悄侵蚀团队根基。对Remote-first团队的leader和协作工具设计师，这是被99%的人忽略的AI副作用。
design.quote: ** AI让你不再需要打断同事——然后你发现，团队信任也一起消失了。

design.title: Why you need to protect your work more than ever
design.content: Marc Andrew，一位从业30年的设计老兵，在文章中发出了一声怒吼。他说「灵感已被爬虫替代，风格已被简化为一段提示词」，并呼吁设计师将知识产权视为AI时代的高价值资产来保护。文章讨论了AI训练数据如何吞噬设计师的个人风格作品、哪些平台的法律保护到位（或完全缺失），以及设计师可以采取的实际防范措施。对那些在社交媒体上发布设计作品的设计师，这是一声从行业前辈口中发出的尖锐警钟。
design.quote: ** 30年老设计师的愤怒：当「灵感」变成了爬虫，「风格」变成了提示词。

design.title: How To Improve UX In Legacy Systems
design.content: Vitaly Friedman为在遗留系统里挣扎的UX设计师提供了实操指南。数据显示企业40-60%的时间花在维护遗留系统上——这意味着UX设计师的大部分精力被消耗在了修修补补而非创新突破上。文章覆盖了如何梳理依赖关系、创建工作流映射、制定渐进式UX路线图，以及在受限环境下推进用户体验改进的具体策略。对在大厂或传统企业做UX、每天和20年历史代码库作斗争的设计师来说，这就是你的每日生存手册。
design.quote: ** 60%的时间在维护旧系统，然后客户还问为什么UX跟不上——问得好。

design.title: Snapseed 4.0
design.content: Google发布了Snapseed 4.0大版本更新，这是这款备受欢迎的移动端照片编辑器多年来的最大升级。新版引入了AI增强的局部调整、更先进的色彩分级工具以及性能优化，同时保持了其一贯的免费策略。Snapseed长期与Adobe Lightroom Mobile争夺移动端摄影编辑的王者地位，这次更新可能改变专业摄影师和内容创作者的移动工作流选择。对喜欢在手机上做后期处理的摄影师和设计师来说，这次更新值得一试。
design.quote: ** Google终于给Snapseed动刀了——老用户等得花都谢了。

design.title: Suprbox: Box for AI agents to secure enterprise data storage
design.content: Suprbox今天在ProductHunt以第一名的成绩发布，定位为AI agent的企业级安全数据存储方案。它允许AI agent在受控环境中存取敏感数据，解决了企业引入AI时的核心担忧：agent能否安全地使用公司数据、如何防止数据泄露。对正在部署AI agent的企业IT团队、数据安全负责人和AI产品开发者而言，这是数据安全基础设施中一个关键的缺失拼图。
design.quote: ** AI agent也需要个保险柜——企业数据安全最后一公里的新答案。
